title: What Do Some of My Favorite S&P 500 Stocks Have In Common? They're All REITs
text: A cell tower company, a lab space owner, a data-center operator, and "The Monthly Dividend Company" are on this shortlist.

title: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (ARE) Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. title: Alexandria's (ARE) Q2 FFO Beats, Revenues Rise Y/Y, View Up
text: Alexandria Real Estate (ARE) reports better-than-anticipated second-quarter 2022 performance attributable to healthy leasing activity and solid rental rate growth. It also raises its 2022 outlook.

title: This is Why Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE) is a Great Dividend Stock
text: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE) have what it takes?

title: Key Factors to Impact Alexandria (ARE) This Earnings Season
text: High demand for premium properties at strategic cluster locations, creditworthy tenants and adequate financial flexibility are likely to have aided Alexandria's (ARE) Q2 earnings.

title: Alexandria: An Excellent Bargain You Don't Want To Miss
text: ARE is a well-positioned REIT that should continue to benefit from strong operating fundamentals and an accretive development pipeline. It maintains a strong balance sheet and pays respectable and growing dividend.

title: Down But Not Out: Buy These Beaten-Down Dividend Stocks Before They Boom Again

title: These 7 beaten-down value stocks are a buy, says a money manager who has outperformed the S&P 500 for 30 years

title: Is Alexandria (ARE) Stock an Apt Choice for Your Portfolio Now?
text: Alexandria's (ARE) high-quality life science and lab office properties in desirable markets are driving demand and occupancy levels. Meanwhile, investment-grade tenants ensure steady cash flow.
